survey.qualityGate: Domain map, traceable paper bank, and gap matrix are complete and evidence-linked.

taskBlueprints.title: Define the research boundary
taskBlueprints.description: Clarify the topic scope, target venue, review criteria, and key research questions.

taskBlueprints.title: Build a traceable literature shortlist
taskBlueprints.description: Collect real papers, canonical links, and screening notes for the core problem area.

taskBlueprints.title: Extract baseline methods and gaps
taskBlueprints.description: Summarize representative baselines, benchmark patterns, and unresolved gaps.

ideation.qualityGate: A lead idea is selected with a clear contribution story and experiment commitments.

taskBlueprints.title: Generate candidate ideas
taskBlueprints.description: Turn the survey and gap map into several candidate directions with clear hypotheses.

taskBlueprints.title: Check novelty and feasibility
taskBlueprints.description: Stress-test the candidates against prior work, resource constraints, and implementation risk.

taskBlueprints.title: Select the lead idea
taskBlueprints.description: Choose the main angle, define the contribution story, and lock the experiment commitments.

experiment.qualityGate: Results are organized with claim-evidence links, caveats, and remaining questions documented.

taskBlueprints.title: Design the experiment plan
taskBlueprints.description: Define implementation scope, datasets, metrics, baselines, and ablations.

taskBlueprints.title: Prepare execution checkpoints
taskBlueprints.description: Break the experiment plan into build tasks, logging checkpoints, and analysis milestones.

taskBlueprints.title: Summarize validated claims
taskBlueprints.description: Organize results, caveats, and claim-evidence links for the writing stage.

publication.qualityGate: Manuscript is complete with audited references and submission-ready assets.

taskBlueprints.title: Draft the paper outline
taskBlueprints.description: Translate the validated research state into a section plan and writing checklist.

taskBlueprints.title: Audit references and evidence links
taskBlueprints.description: Check citations, claims, and reference formatting before the manuscript hardens.

taskBlueprints.title: Prepare submission assets
taskBlueprints.description: Finalize checklist items, figures, appendix needs, and submission-facing notes.

promotion.qualityGate: Slides, talk track, and release-facing materials are ready for dissemination.

taskBlueprints.title: Prepare slides and talk track
taskBlueprints.description: Turn the stable manuscript into slides, a talk narrative, and summary framing.

taskBlueprints.title: Prepare release-facing assets
taskBlueprints.description: Draft release notes, project summary text, and downstream communication materials.
